none.description:
{Starfall Test}

Temporary Fire Magic test version.

No mastery: Frost Ring-like pattern. Troops in hexes surrounding the target hex receive damage. The target hex is unaffected.

Damage: 10 + Spell Power x 10.

basic.description:
{Basic Starfall Test}

Temporary Fire Magic test version.

Basic: Frost Ring-like pattern. Troops in hexes surrounding the target hex receive damage. The target hex is unaffected.

Damage: 10 + Spell Power x 10.

advanced.description:
{Advanced Starfall Test}

Temporary Fire Magic test version.

Advanced: Fireball-like pattern. Troops in the target hex and surrounding hexes receive damage.

Damage: 25 + Spell Power x 10.

expert.description:
{Expert Starfall Test}

Temporary Fire Magic test version.

Expert: target hex, radius 1 and radius 3 receive damage. Radius 2 should be unaffected.

Damage: 50 + Spell Power x 10.
